chart.title: Lifecycle carbon intensity of electricity
chart.subtitle: Measured in grams of [carbon dioxide-equivalents](#dod:carbondioxideequivalents) emitted per [kilowatt-hour](#dod:watt-hours) of electricity generated. Emissions are estimated on a lifecycle basis, including upstream, supply chain and manufacturing stages, and cover all greenhouse gases.

Lifecycle carbon intensity of electricit.titleShort: Lifecycle carbon intensity of electricity generation
Lifecycle carbon intensity of electricit.titleLong: Lifecycle carbon intensity of electricity generation - Ember
Lifecycle carbon intensity of electricit.descriptionShort: [Greenhouse gases](#dod:ghgemissions) emitted per unit of generated electricity, measured in grams of [CO₂ equivalents](#dod:carbondioxideequivalents) per [kilowatt-hour](#dod:watt-hours).
Lifecycle carbon intensity of electricit.descriptionProcessing: - Electricity data from 2000 onwards (and from 1990 onwards for European countries, including Turkey) comes from Ember. Earlier data comes from the Energy Institute.
Lifecycle carbon intensity of electricit.unit: grams of CO₂ equivalents per kilowatt-hour
Lifecycle carbon intensity of electricit.citationShort: Ember (2026) – with major processing by Our World in Data
Lifecycle carbon intensity of electricit.citationLong: Ember (2026) – with major processing by Our World in Data. “Lifecycle carbon intensity of electricity generation – Ember” [dataset]. Ember, “Yearly Electricity Data Europe”; Ember, “Yearly Electricity Data” [original data].
